description: When commit_mode=diff_only AND issue_number provided, healer invokes /fix-issue --diff-only with the issue_number.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: issue_number is read from dispatch context, not derived
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: Spec §3.9 chain: T2B → healer (issue_number) → /fix-issue --diff-only (issue_number) → diff file
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Issue number must be valid integer; healer rejects malformed values
